products.name: VX Gaming Hera Series Gaming Mouse
products.overview: High precision sensor Rubberized anti-slip surfaces Multi-mode colour illumination 7 Buttons Heavy duty cable 6 Buttons and scroll wheel Optical sensor DPI adjust indicator
products.description: VX Gaming Hera Series Gaming Mouse The VX Gaming Hera Series Gaming Mouse is designed to deliver precision, speed, and comfort for gamers of all levels. Equipped with a high-precision Instant 825 optical sensor, it offers adjustable DPI settings ranging from 600 up to 12,000, allowing you to tailor sensitivity to your playstyle. Its ergonomic design with rubberized anti-slip surfaces ensures a secure and comfortable grip during long gaming sessions, while the durable heavy-duty 1.5m cable provides reliable performance over time. Featuring multi-mode RGB rainbow illumination with a DPI adjustment indicator, the Hera adds a stylish, customizable touch to any gaming setup. With multiple responsive buttons and smooth tracking, this mouse is built to give you the control and accuracy needed to stay ahead of the competition.

products.name: Redragon M616 Trident 10000DPI RGB Gaming Mouse – Black
products.overview: 6 Programmable buttons 5 Adjustable DPI levels Pixart SG8925 sensor Ergonomic natural grip build 8 Backlit modes DIY key binds RGB lighting 18 Months Warranty
products.description: R edragon M616 Trident 10000DPI RGB Gaming Mouse – Black The Redragon M616 Trident RGB Gaming Mouse – Black is built for gamers who value precision, performance, and comfort. Featuring a high-precision sensor with up to 10,000 DPI , it offers five adjustable DPI levels (800/1200/1600/2400/10,000) to suit every gaming scenario, from fast-paced shooters to detailed strategy games. The six programmable buttons allow for customized controls and macros, enhancing your in-game efficiency. Designed with an ergonomic shape and a frosted, anti-slip coating , the M616 ensures a comfortable, secure grip during extended sessions. The dynamic RGB backlighting adds an eye-catching aesthetic, making it a standout addition to any gaming setup. Whether you're competing or creating, the Redragon M616 delivers responsive control and reliable performance.

products.description: Redragon Griffin 7200dpi Gaming Mouse The Redragon Griffin is an ergonomically designed gaming mouse with smooth RGB lighting and additional buttons to allow you to play at your best. It has a precise sensor that can be used at up to 7200 DP, letting you play the way you like.

products.name: Redragon NEMEANLION 2 7200DPI Gaming Mouse Black
products.overview: Soft rubber skin surface coating Long braided cord of 1.8m Gold-plated surface Specially invented teflon 2 extra buttons on the top side High precision optical sensor Cursor speed can be adjusted Different colour backlight
products.description: Redragon NEMEANLION 2 7200DPI Gaming Mouse Black Take strides ahead of the pack with the Nemeanlion Gaming Mouse. The mouse features 7200 DPI sensitivity, smooth Teflon footpads, and six programmable buttons, complemented by beautiful RGB backlighting. Soft Rubber Skin surface coating- Long braided cord of 1.8 m endures 10,000 flexes and the continuous load of 10 kN, gold-plated surface ensures a better connection, with long-lasting quality. Specially invented Teflon formula ensures excellent gliding. Thanks to the enlarged foot surface, balanced foot height and optimal placement the mouse moves strictly horizontally. 2 customizable thumb buttons allow the user to adjust the mouse to their needs, 2 extra buttons on the top side- high precision optical sensor- cursor speed can be adjusted on any mouse key. 4 DPI levels are supported and each level can be customized accurately to your needs. The different colour backlight of the extra buttons on top allows identifying the active DPI level with ease.
